title: Splitting With Roommates
scenario: You share a flat with two roommates. Rent, electricity, water and the internet bill come to about ₹36,000 between you, but lately one person keeps 'forgetting' to pay their share and you have been quietly covering the gap. It is starting to strain your own budget.

choices.label: Set up a shared expense tracker and a fixed split everyone pays by the 5th
choices.lesson: Clear, written splits and a shared tracker prevent awkwardness and silent overpaying. Money clarity protects both friendships and budgets.

choices.label: Keep covering the shortfall to avoid an awkward conversation
choices.lesson: Avoiding the conversation just transfers the cost to you every month. Fair systems, not silence, keep shared living sustainable.
